name: Steamed Spareribs with Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Chinese fermented black beans (coarsely chopped)
1 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Ask your butcher to cut the spareribs into individual ribs and then into 2-inch segments, or do it yourself with a cleaver or a sharp, heavy knife.
2. Rub the spareribs with salt and let them sit in a bowl for about 20-to-25 minutes.
3. Fill a large saucepan with water and bring it to a boil.
4. Turn the heat to low, add the spareribs and simmer them for 10 minutes.
5. Drain the spareribs and discard the water.
6. Mix the other ingredients together in a large bowl and stir in the spareribs, coating them well with the mixture.
7. Transfer the mixture to a deep plate or dish.
8. Set up a steamer or put a rack into a wok or large deep pot.
9. Pour in 2 inches of water. Bring the water to a boil, then reduce the heat.
10. Lower the plate of spareribs carefully into the steamer or onto the rack.
11. Cover it with a lid and steam gently for 1 hour or until the spareribs are very tender.
12. Keep a careful watch on the water level and replenish it with hot water when necessary.
13. Skim off any surface fat, and serve. You can make this dish ahead of time and reheat the ribs by steaming for 20 minutes or until they are hot.
